---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve GemFinder
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- **Browser Version**: [e.g. 120]
- **Node.js Version**: [if running locally, e.g. 18.0.0]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (error messages, console logs, etc.)

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues
- [ ] I can reproduce this issue consistently
- [ ] I have provided all relevant information
